# Code Review: Modalize Mock in PointsInfoBottomSheet Test

## Verdict: REQUEST_CHANGES

---

## Analysis

Let me first examine the actual codebase to ground this review in concrete evidence rather than assumptions.

Let me examine the relevant files in parallel.
Now let me check which other test files might also need this same mock, and examine the component and its dependency chain.
Now let me check the actual component under test and the BackDropBottom component to understand the import chain.
Now I have the full picture. Let me also check if PointsDetail/view.test.tsx already has the same mock or needs it.
